summary_of_concern: Sections of the submitted report appeared stylistically inconsistent and closely aligned with AI-generated output.
narrative_and_rationale: The student was informed of the concern and given the opportunity to respond. The case was treated as plagiarism-related academic misconduct under the Procedure.
student_contact_email_subject: Invitation to discuss academic misconduct concern
student_contact_email_body:
Dear Jane Smith,

A concern has been identified regarding your submission. You are invited to a Teams meeting to discuss the concern and review the evidence.

Kind regards,
Dr Sharjeel Aslam
outcome_email_body:
Dear Jane Smith,

Following the review, the concern has been classified as a Moderate plagiarism-related first offence.

Kind regards,
Dr Sharjeel Aslam
